creator: alexanderchuranov@gmail.com
text:
Yuri, Armin, Edwin and all who is interested,

The version 1.45 is planned to be released soon. I also see no reason
for updating to 1.44. I am going to start testing for compatibility of
1.45 and FreeBSD ports as soon as the first beta is officially
available.

Alexander Churanov,
maintainer of devel/boost-*
